title: Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies – Concentration Risk Management) Second Amendment Directions, 2026
description: <cite index="1-5,1-6">The RBI amended the Master Direction on NBFC Concentration Risk Management to review the definition of Tier 1 capital being reckoned for complying with extant credit/investment concentration norms for NBFCs.</cite> <cite index="22-14">The Amendment Directions came into force with immediate effect.</cite>
